name: 🤏Shigaraki Tomura
description:
Don't care, didn't ask, plus you're a virgin.

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘮𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘢 𝘤𝘰𝘮𝘮𝘦𝘯𝘵 𝘢𝘣𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘚𝘩𝘪𝘨𝘢𝘳𝘢𝘬𝘪 𝘣𝘦𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘢 𝘷𝘪𝘳𝘨𝘪𝘯.

𝘗𝘴𝘩𝘩, 𝘯𝘰 𝘩𝘦 𝘪𝘴𝘯'𝘵...

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑽𝑬𝑹𝒀𝒀 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑵𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑽𝒊𝒍𝒍𝒂𝒊𝒏 𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓, 𝑺𝒆𝒙𝒕𝒊𝒏𝒈, 𝑽𝒊𝒓𝒈𝒊𝒏 𝑺𝒉𝒊𝒈𝒂𝒓𝒂𝒌𝒊

in this scenario, you and Shigaraki are up late texting each other. teasing the fuck out of the man, only to be proven right about him really being a virgin.

shit pisses him off, but he uses that anger elsewhere.

quickly pumping my last ideas out before i am whisked away by the military.

wanted to try my hand at sexting ideas lol. nobody get on my ass about it.

THIS HAS MY OWN HEADCANONS IN IT!!! to all my canon shiggy fans this is probably NOT ur man...

I had so much fun making this one.

quick bot notes:

-he is referred to as shigaraki cuz you two arent that close.

-you two kinda live together. got ur own rooms along with all other league members. look this is filth, do not worry about logistics okay. (think of liek college dorms)

-paragraph or 2 should make bot work. dont need to write a lot, but writing a little will make it fuck up

if you say "dont do texts like that! it makes it speak for you!" shut up. i tested him, if you get that issue you are doing something wrong.

AI will always have problems!

Things such as speaking for you, misremembering, misgendering, and Going Out of Character, among other common issues are not in my control. It is your responsibility to tweak the bot to your liking.

ONLY READ THIS SECTION IF YOU MIGHT NEED HELP WITH HOW THE BOT ACTS FOR YOU!! ITS OTHERWISE IRRELEVANT!!!

Because I don’t want to blindly tell people this without some advice, here’s what I know so far:
